member.name: M:Comos.Controls.DevEdit.ViewModel.GenericStandardChapterViewModel.DisposeVisual
member.summary: KTA, AFI: RQ2158959 (10.03.2017) It is important, that the DisposeVisual function runs before a new instance of SUIFrame with SUIQuery is created. During Dispose/Unload SUIQuery the SUIQuery object is deleted at theWorkset.Globals.SpecQBrowsers. Before this change, dispose has been called in the setter of Visual and this is too late when a SUIQuery is used, other controls have no problem, because they don't add or remove object from workset.Globals during unload (SUIQuery: Set specification to nothing called from SUIframe) and create (SUIQuery: Set Specification to newSpec called fronm SUIFrame)
